# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

Prevent linkerd no mtls.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: my-namespace
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  service: my-service
  port: 8080
  mtls:
    enabled: true
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-service-auth
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  service: my-service
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespace: my-namespace
            service: my-other-service
      to:
        - operation:
            method: GET
            path: /api
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-other-service-server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  service: my-other-service
  port: 8080
  mtls:
    enabled: true
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-other-service-auth
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  service: my-other-service
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespace: my-namespace
            service: my-service
      to:
        - operation:
            method: POST
            path: /api
---
